ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the generation belongs to */,
  "generation_number" INTEGER /* Number of the generation */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version identifier for the generation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the generation was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the generation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the generation was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the generation */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used to train the generation (e.g., learning rate, batch size) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_generations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation the score belongs to */,
  "score_value" REAL /* Value of the score */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of the score (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was recorded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the score */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES model_generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "raw_scores" (
  "raw_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each raw score */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation the raw score belongs to */,
  "data" TEXT /* Raw score data (e.g., JSON array of scores) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the raw score was recorded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the raw score */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the raw score was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the raw score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("raw_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raw_scores_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES model_generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "own_scores" (
  "own_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each own score */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation the own score belongs to */,
  "score_value" REAL /* Value of the own score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the own score was recorded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the own score */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the own score was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the own score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("own_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_own_scores_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES model_generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the metric */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES model_generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Number of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the model file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., model, checkpoint) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_files_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_checkpoints" (
  "checkpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each checkpoint */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the checkpoint belongs to */,
  "checkpoint_number" INTEGER /* Number of the checkpoint */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the checkpoint file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the checkpoint file in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the checkpoint was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the checkpoint */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the checkpoint was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the checkpoint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("checkpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_checkpoints_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access log */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_project_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_project_relationships_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_project_relationships_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the team */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the team */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the team (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_team_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_team_relationships_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_team_relationships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES model_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the rating belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the rating */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_ratings_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
